task_completion.description: The agent navigates the map view to the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map viewport displays the distinctive red structure of the Golden Gate Bridge and the surrounding water/land.

task_completion.description: The agent activates the 'Add Placemark' tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' dialog box (or 'Untitled Placemark' properties window) is visible on the screen, or the 'Add Placemark' icon in the toolbar is active.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the correct name for the placemark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field within the placemark dialog box contains the text 'Golden Gate Bridge'.

task_completion.description: The placemark pin is visually positioned on the bridge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The yellow pushpin (or selected placemark icon) is located directly on top of the Golden Gate Bridge structure in the map view.

task_completion.description: The placemark is saved and appears in the Places list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (usually on the left) lists an item named 'Golden Gate Bridge', or the label 'Golden Gate Bridge' is permanently visible on the map next to a pin.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the actual Google Earth interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard Google Earth UI elements (compass, zoom controls, sidebar, toolbar) and 3D/satellite imagery, not a text editor or static image viewer.

integrity.description: The placemark is created via the GUI, not by importing a file or using a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Add Placemark' button or menu option, rather than using a 'File > Import' dialog or typing commands in a terminal window.

integrity.description: The map imagery is rendered correctly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map area shows actual satellite/aerial imagery of San Francisco, not a black screen, wireframe, or error message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco (approximate coordinates: 37.8199, -122.4783). The bridge is a distinctive red suspension bridge spanning water. The required placemark name is 'Golden Gate Bridge'.
